prompt: Rivet, a small friendly raccoon helper mascot for a gentle children game. Dark navy fur with golden-brown patches on belly, ear-fluff and paw-tips, large kind round eyes with warm amber pupils, a brown leather satchel across the chest. Cute storybook proportions, oversized head, stubby limbs, soft rounded shapes, relaxed slightly forward-leaning friendly pose. Hard ink outline, clean readable pixel art, transparent background, low top-down view, facing south toward the viewer.
